title: 金苹果综合优化GoldenApple Optimized
description:
一个专注于优化和辅助类型的整合包,希望可以为您提供一个更好的游戏体验!
An integration modpack focused on optimization and auxiliary types, hoping to provide you with a better gaming experience!
body:
- **在此整合包中,我们添加了许多如"纳","锂"等优化模组,以便为您提供流畅且优质的游戏体验,并且我们还添加了如"Xaero的世界地图","更好的F3"等辅助模组,这些辅助模组可以更加便捷的让您在游戏中探索.**
> - **In this modpack, we have added numerous optimization mods such as "Sodium" and "Lithium" to provide you with a smooth and high-quality gaming experience. Additionally, we have included auxiliary mods like "Xaero's World Map" and "Better F3," which make in-game exploration more convenient for you.**
- **如运行在非Windows设备上出现崩溃情况，请在包含以下模组的版本中禁用它们.**
> - **If crashes occur on non-Windows devices, please disable them in versions that include the following mods.**
> 1. DistantHorizons
> 2. Sound Physics Remastered
> 3. IMBlocker
> 4. Voxy
